title: Novastar Corporation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Novastar Corporation''' was a company that specialized in the production of [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computers]], such as the [[L-17A Quikjump|L-17A Quickjump]]. Several rumors surrounded the company, including one belief that the Novastar was secretly producing a nav computer that could be used without an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. Another rumor suggested that the corporation had secretly acquired an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] for the conducting of experiments. The company reached the height of its success during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XXF -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''
